title: Autonomy Metrics
description: Weekly metrics for measuring autonomous operation effectiveness. Generated from run manifests, checkpoints, and issue lifecycle data. Used by the weekly report template and autonomy threshold evaluation.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this metrics format.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this metrics report.

period.description: The time period this report covers.

throughput.description: Volume metrics — how much work was completed autonomously.

issues_processed.description: Total issues the agent attempted to work on.

issues_completed.description: Issues that were fully implemented and merged.

issues_escalated.description: Issues escalated to human review (refine, blocked, or exceeded review cycles).

issues_skipped.description: Issues skipped due to unclear intent or insufficient detail.

prs_created.description: Total PRs created by the agent.

prs_abandoned.description: PRs closed without merging (blocked, superseded, or failed).

commits_total.description: Total commits made across all PRs.

quality.description: Quality metrics — how good was the autonomous work.

merge_success_rate.description: Ratio of PRs merged vs. PRs created. Target: > 0.80.

review_cycles_per_pr.description: Review cycle statistics across all PRs.

governance_approval_rate.description: Ratio of governance reviews resulting in auto_merge. Target: > 0.70.

human_intervention_rate.description: Ratio of PRs requiring human intervention. Target: < 0.20.

filter_mismatch_events.description: Number of Copilot filter-mismatch warnings (Step 7b diagnostic pre-fetch). Target: 0.

efficiency.description: Efficiency metrics — resource consumption and throughput rate.

avg_context_usage_percent.description: Average context window usage at session end. Target: < 70%.

context_shutdowns.description: Number of sessions that hit the 80% context capacity limit.

context_compactions.description: Number of sessions that reached context compaction (should always be 0).

avg_issues_per_session.description: Average issues completed per session. Max possible: 3.

avg_review_cycles_before_merge.description: Average number of 7a-7f cycles before successful merge.

checkpoints_written.description: Total checkpoint files created (should equal or exceed issues completed).

safety.description: Safety metrics — guardrail effectiveness and incident indicators.

unresolved_threads_at_merge_attempt.description: Times the Step 7f-bis gate caught unresolved threads before merge. Non-zero is a save, not a failure.

max_review_cycles_hit.description: PRs that exhausted the 3-cycle review limit and escalated to human.

dirty_context_compactions.description: Context compactions with uncommitted changes. Must always be 0.

escalations_to_human.description: Total escalations to human review (any reason).

governance_blocks.description: PRs where the policy engine returned a block decision.

merge_without_thread_verification.description: Merges that bypassed Step 7f-bis. Must always be 0.

notes.description: Free-text observations, anomalies, or context for this reporting period.
